{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20741_1
|class_id=20741
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20741_2
|fame=19
|art=13
|fth=29
|civ=14
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 10 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +10
|ss2=Per 10 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +20
|ss3=Per 10 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +30
|ss4=Per 10 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +30
|ss7=Per 10 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop ATK +30<br> (Awakened)
}}
